case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. FRANCISCO DE JESUS RUIZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FRANCISCO DE JESUS RUIZ. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,023.94 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT DE JESUS RUIZ, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED JUL-18-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE JESUS RUIZ, FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE JESUS RUIZ, FRANCISCO $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $945.00, AMOUNT OF PRINCIPAL OWED. DEFENDANT DOES NOT OWE FINANCE CHARGES AS THEY ARE IN EXCESS OF CA FIN 22370(B)(1) OR THE DISCRETIONARY LATE FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
